# cmccloudv2_mysql_database (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# create mysql database
resource "cmccloudv2_mysql_database" "db1" {
    instance_id   = "4233c081-0f75-4d9a-83f0-3641a0da1a62"
    name          = "db1"
    character_set = "utf8mb4"
    collation     = "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Mysql database id
- `name` (String) Mysql database name

### Optional

- `character_set` (String) Mysql character set, default is `utf8mb4`
- `collation` (String) Mysql collation, default is `utf8mb4_unicode_ci`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
